{{Infobox character
| name = Harriford Wells
| introduced = ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers
}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Harriford Wells]] is the leader of a brigand gang that took over [[Dalton Foster]]'s town.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c18">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Wells is a bandit leader.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Harriford Wells]] is the only person in the world with an [[Awakened gun]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Wells is the leader of a gang that holds an entire town captive.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c18" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
